entries.title: M.Sc. Robotics, Cognition, Intelligence
entries.summary: Interdisciplinary master’s program at TUM, focusing on intelligent systems, autonomous robotics and cognitive technologies.
highlights: Machine Learning, Introduction to Deep Learning
3D Computer Vision, Advanced Deep Learning for Computer Vision
Robot Dynamics, Control of Modern Leightweight Robots, Autonomous Systems

entries.title: B.Sc. Engineering Cybernetics
entries.summary: Advanced focus on system dynamics, control theory, and mathematical modeling to architect and optimize intelligent systems in robotics, autonomous tech, and AI.
entries.details:
Thesis: ”Advancement of a Reinforcement‑Learning based operational strategy for a façade‑integrated adsorption system” 
 
 Relevant Coursework:
highlights: Programming and Software Development, Numerical Methods, Machine Learning, Reinforcement Learning
System Dynamics, Multivariable Control, Simulation Engineering

entries.title: AI Engineer
entries.summary: Engineer in TUM’s student initiative for socially impactful AI.
entries.details:
The TUM Social AI Club connects students with nonprofit and mission-driven organizations for semester-long AI projects. Partners and supporters—including companies such as OpenAI and AWS—help enable the club’s work.
 
 Responsibilities:
highlights: Technical contributions to club projects (analysis, development, testing, delivery)
Interdisciplinary collaboration within the engineering team

entries.title: Student Research Assistant
entries.org: Institute for System Dynamics, University of Stuttgart
entries.summary: Continuation of bachelor’s thesis research: optimizing the operational strategy of an adsorption façade using deep reinforcement learning.
highlights: Refined the Deep RL model architecture

entries.title: Intern at FARO Labs
entries.summary: Eleven-month full-time internship in the Faro-Labs development department.
entries.details:
FARO Europe GmbH & Co. KG develops and markets portable 3D measurement and imaging systems worldwide.
 
 Responsibilities:
highlights: Automation of UI, unit, and API tests
Design and implementation of a noise filter for a prototype
Implementation of a system diagnostics module

entries.title: Youth Soccer Coach
entries.summary: Head coach of the U11 team
highlights: Organization and supervision of training sessions, matches and tournaments
Communication with club management and parents
